examples: The people in the stands at Candlestick Park are standing and cheering with all their might.
He shall order the lamps upon the pure candlestick before the LORD continually.
And Aaron did so; he lighted the lamps thereof over against the candlestick, as the LORD commanded Moses.
We decided to pass on blue and green elf candlestick holders that Ms. Lovett recommended.
In December 2011, the lights went out twice during the same game at Candlestick Park.
